Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Wasn't the party we had so much fun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}After I got home, I still ended up eating dinner after that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I thought my stomach was gonna explode![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...Is that supposed to be a compliment?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I think I ate enough to last three days... But it tasted great, so whatever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I couldn't help it! My mom's cooking is just too good to pass up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, do you wanna come over next time and try it? Kaz does all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}...Oh, wait, that's not what I wanted to talk about today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Do you remember when I told you about what happened to me at school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}It was when I handed in a blank answer sheet for that pop quiz, and I got yelled at by Ekoda...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Back then, I wasn't really giving any thought to my future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But after coaching those kids, I started to realize something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I think I finally figured out what I want to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}No, not that. I'd rather just teach. Being a professional athlete is too hard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 13 12 15 106}Hmm... Close! You almost got it, Mr. Ex-Assistant Coach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}I did consider that one too, but I decided I should focus on one thing specifically.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}Come on, {f 4 1}-kun, are you that dense? Or did I not give you enough clues?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I'm thinking of becoming an athletic trainer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}It's their job to monitor each athlete's diet, and help them plan their training routine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}So I'll go to professional school once I graduate, and then work towards earning my certification when I turn twenty.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Between the general education requirements and the classes for my major, it's gonna be over 350 hours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}That's why I'm gonna start studying right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I have to make up for all that time I wasted.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Those kids really had a huge influence on me. I know I only agreed to coach them on a whim, but teaching them got me thinking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I started wondering what I could teach my own kids one day... And I realized I didn't have the slightest clue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}If you hadn't been there with me, I don't think I could've stuck it out until the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}And I definitely never would've given any thought to my future, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko seems appreciative.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I... also want to apologize. I know I'm always asking you to stick around and help me with stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}But it's just because you're so reliable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Thinking back, I really caused you a lot of trouble, so... I'm sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_015_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can rely on me even more.

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Oh, what a relief! I'm so glad to have a great friend like you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}...Really? I'm gonna remember you said that, okay!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Man... {f 4 1}-kun, you're the best! You can bet I'll be counting on you in the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}But also, I've got your back too. You know that, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Unlike Kaz, you never show your emotions up front, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}You seem more like the type to keep things bottled up, so I'm a little worried about you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}If you've got something on your mind, I'm here for you anytime, even if you just gotta rant, all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}I mean, I can't guarantee that I'll be much help, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I'm nothing compared to you, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Sorry, can't help you there. I could honestly use a bit of help myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}And anyways, you gotta do your own homework![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}But if nothing else, I at least have lots of stamina![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}As long as it's not schoolwork, I think I can be of some help! Don't be shy to ask, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel affection coming from Yuko...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Lately, I've been trying to drink coffee when I study.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}But I still get so sleepy... I wonder if it's because I add too much sugar.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had fun chatting with Yuko for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
